speaker: owner
context: Wiki owner providing personal memories about the Portland trip

entries.content: At the airport I had my water bottle confiscated because I forgot to empty it before security. I was annoyed the whole flight.
On the first night at the rental, there was a strange humming noise from the fridge that kept us up. We unplugged it and just ate out for every meal after that.
I bought a hand-carved wooden bird at the Saturday market. The vendor told us the story behind the design and we ended up talking for twenty minutes.
My favourite discovery was the lavender lemonade at the food cart pod. I went back for it three times.
